steps.title: Use an exponential regression
steps.content: The function is exponential, and the table shows $g(0)=1$ and $g(1)=\frac{1}{25}$. Enter those points and run the exponential regression $y_1 \sim a b^{x_1}$.

steps.title: Read the base
steps.content: Desmos gives $a=1$ and $b=\frac{1}{25}$, so $g(x)=\left(\frac{1}{25}\right)^x$. The positive value at $x=0$ also eliminates the choices with a leading negative sign.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is $g(x)=\left(\frac{1}{25}\right)^x$, so D is correct.
